overview:
## Return Value

A new, independent random source.

## Discussion

Any two random sources initialized with the same seed data will generate the same sequence of random numbers. To replicate the behavior of an existing [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKARC4RandomSource] instance, read that instance’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKARC4RandomSource/seed] property and then create a new instance by passing the resulting data to the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKARC4RandomSource/init(seed:)] initializer.

For a source of high-entropy seed data, see the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/SecRandomCopyBytes(_:_:_:)] function.

# init(seed:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a random source with the specified seed data.

## Declaration

```swift
init(seed: Data)
```

## Parameters

- **seed**: A data object containing seed values for the random number generator.

## Return Value

A new, independent random source.

## Discussion

Any two random sources initialized with the same seed data will generate the same sequence of random numbers. To replicate the behavior of an existing [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKARC4RandomSource] instance, read that instance’s [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKARC4RandomSource/seed] property and then create a new instance by passing the resulting data to the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKARC4RandomSource/init(seed:)] initializer.

For a source of high-entropy seed data, see the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/SecRandomCopyBytes(_:_:_:)] function.

## Creating a Random Source

- **init()**: Initializes a random source from a nondeterministic seed.
